## Skill / Agent name

<!-- e.g., neqsim-lng-operations or a new agent like lng.operations -->

## Type

- [ ] New skill (`.github/skills/*/SKILL.md`)
- [ ] New agent (`.github/agents/*.agent.md`)
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill/agent: <!-- name -->

## Description

<!-- What engineering domain does this cover? When should an agent load it? -->

## Trigger conditions (USE WHEN)

<!-- When should this skill be loaded? Be specific. -->

- When the user asks about ...
- When a task involves ...

## Key patterns to include

<!-- What code patterns, rules, or domain knowledge would this skill provide? -->

1. ...
2. ...

## Core vs. community

<!-- Should this be in the core repo or a community skill? See VISION_AGENTS.md -->

- [ ] **Core** — references NeqSim Java classes, useful to many users
- [ ] **Community** — company-specific or experimental

## Related skills/agents

<!-- Which existing skills or agents overlap or complement this? -->

- ...

## I'm willing to contribute this

- [ ] Yes, I plan to submit a PR
- [ ] No, I'm suggesting it for someone else to pick up
